title: Redfin Market Tracker Record
description: A single record from a Redfin Data Center market tracker dataset, representing housing market metrics for a specific region, property type, and time period.

period_begin.description: Start date of the measurement period.

period_end.description: End date of the measurement period.

region_type_id.description: Numeric identifier for the region type.

table_id.description: Numeric identifier for the data table.

is_seasonally_adjusted.description: Whether the data has been seasonally adjusted.

city.description: City name, if applicable to the region level.

property_type.description: Property type segment for the metrics.

median_sale_price.description: Median sale price for the period and region in USD.

median_sale_price_yoy.description: Year-over-year change in median sale price as a decimal (e.g., 0.05 for 5% increase).

median_list_price.description: Median list price for the period and region in USD.

median_list_price_yoy.description: Year-over-year change in median list price as a decimal.

median_ppsf.description: Median price per square foot in USD.

median_ppsf_yoy.description: Year-over-year change in median price per square foot as a decimal.

homes_sold.description: Number of homes sold during the period.

homes_sold_yoy.description: Year-over-year change in homes sold as a decimal.

pending_sales.description: Number of pending sales during the period.

pending_sales_yoy.description: Year-over-year change in pending sales as a decimal.

new_listings.description: Number of new listings added during the period.

new_listings_yoy.description: Year-over-year change in new listings as a decimal.

inventory.description: Total active inventory at the end of the period.

inventory_yoy.description: Year-over-year change in inventory as a decimal.

months_of_supply.description: Months of supply based on current sales pace.

months_of_supply_yoy.description: Year-over-year change in months of supply as a decimal.

median_dom_yoy.description: Year-over-year change in median days on market as a decimal.

avg_sale_to_list.description: Average sale-to-list price ratio (e.g., 1.02 means 2% above list).

avg_sale_to_list_yoy.description: Year-over-year change in average sale-to-list ratio.

sold_above_list.description: Proportion of homes sold above list price (0 to 1).

sold_above_list_yoy.description: Year-over-year change in proportion sold above list.

price_drops.description: Proportion of listings with price drops (0 to 1).

price_drops_yoy.description: Year-over-year change in proportion of price drops.

off_market_in_two_weeks.description: Proportion of listings that went off market within two weeks (0 to 1).

off_market_in_two_weeks_yoy.description: Year-over-year change in proportion going off market in two weeks.
